basic_details.job_title: PRL Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Physical Research Laboratory (PRL) has officially announced the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 with 2 openings. The detailed notification was published under Advertisement No. 08/2026 on the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of maximum 35 years and hold a Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Basic and Applied Science) with first division along with a minimum of 2 years' experience in Research and Development in relevant organizations can submit their applications through email on or before 25 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Basic and Applied Science) from a recognized University or equivalent (with first division), Minimum 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions, or Science and Technology Organizations, and Scientific activities and services
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Basic and Applied Science) from a recognized University or equivalent (with first division as defined by the awarding Institute/ University). Minimum 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions, or Science and Technology Organizations, and Scientific activities and services. Desirable: Good knowledge of Physics/Optics, programming languages, and some experience in experiments. Preferable: The Candidate should have qualified NET/GATE in the year 2022 or after.

salary_details.details: Rs. 42000/- + HRA as per prevailing rates Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.physical_research_laboratory_prl: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Basic and Applied Science) from a recognized University or equivalent (with first division), Minimum 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions, or Science and Technology Organizations, and Scientific activities and services

content_sections.heading: PRL Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PRL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PRL Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PRL Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Basic and Applied Science) from a recognized University or equivalent (with first division as defined by the awarding Institute/ University). Minimum 2 years' experience in Research and Development in Industrial and Academic Institutions, or Science and Technology Organizations, and Scientific activities and services. Desirable: Good knowledge of Physics/Optics, programming languages, and some experience in experiments. Preferable: The Candidate should have qualified NET/GATE in the year 2022 or after.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 42000/- + HRA as per prevailing rates Per Month

content_sections.heading: PRL Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date of receipt of applications

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PRL Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PRL Senior Research Fellow (SRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the SRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Natural Sciences (Basic and Applied Science) with a first division from a recognized university and at least 2 years of research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Senior Research Fellow post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month, plus HRA as per prevailing rates.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for applying to PRL SRF posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the PRL Senior Research Fellow (SRF) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted in an online mode.

faq.question: Q9. Does PRL offer any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data does not explicitly mention age relaxation details for reserved categories. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for specific information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Physical Research Laboratory?
faq.answer: The official website of Physical Research Laboratory is www.prl.res.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and updates.
